name: VGC Live
description: Jordan Middler, Chris Scullion, and Andy Robinson bring VGC: The Video Game Podcast to Glasgow's historic Oran Mor for a night of gaming nonsense, energy drinks, and special guests!
short_description: Jordan Middler, Chris Scullion, and Andy Robinson bring VGC: The Video Game Podcast to Glasgow's historic Oran Mor for a night of gaming nonsense, energy drinks, and special guests!
